title: Metals Rebound As Focus Returns To Tight Supplies And Stimulus Measures
section_path: Metals Rebound As Focus Returns To Tight Supplies And Stimulus Measures
section_path_text: Metals Rebound As Focus Returns To Tight Supplies And Stimulus Measures
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodities gained as investors shrugged off concerns of weaker economic growth to focus on the broad tightness across most markets amid supply side issues. A weaker USD also helped support investor appetite. Crude oil prices were under pressure early in the session as concerns of weaker economic growth amid tighter monetary policies by central banks remained the focus.
